title: Completed Access to Information Request Summaries dataset - Open Government Portal
content:
## Completed Access to Information Request Summaries dataset
All institutions subject to the Access to Information Act are required to post summaries of completed access to information (ATI) requests within thirty calendar days after the end of each month.
Download a dataset of Completed Access to Information Request Summaries from federal institutions below.
Requests focusing on personal information or third-party proprietary information are not included in these datasets. Not all federal institutions post their Completed Access to Information Request Summaries on the Open Government Portal and such information is not captured in the datasets.
In addition to the downloadable dataset, a link is available below as a resource to Search Summaries of Completed Access to Information Requests completed since January 2020.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Treasury Board of Canada Secretariat
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Completed Access to Information Request Summaries dataset CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Completed Access to Information Request Summaries dataset (Nothing to report) CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
